dimensions.name: Problem Understanding
dimensions.criteria: Clarifies scope, assumptions, inputs, outputs, and business context.

dimensions.name: Technical Approach
dimensions.criteria: Uses appropriate algorithm, SQL, API, automation, or architecture strategy.

dimensions.name: Edge Cases and Risks
dimensions.criteria: Identifies nulls, duplicates, boundary cases, failures, security, data quality, and production risks.

dimensions.name: Testing Strategy
dimensions.criteria: Explains positive, negative, regression, data-driven, and automation coverage.

dimensions.name: Evidence and Observability
dimensions.criteria: Describes logs, reports, screenshots, CI output, reconciliation, metrics, or audit evidence.

dimensions.name: Communication and Interview Defense
dimensions.criteria: Explains clearly, links to real enterprise projects, and handles follow-up questions.
